final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
